question: A company makes forecasts each quarter to decide how to optimize operations to meet expected demand. The company uses ML models to make these forecasts. An AI practitioner is writing a report about the trained ML models to provide transparency and explainability to company stakeholders. What should the AI practitioner include in the report to meet the transparency and explainability requirements?

A law firm wants to build an AI application by using large language models (LLMs). The application will read legal documents and extract key points from the documents. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Build an automatic named entity recognition system.

question: A company wants to classify human genes into 20 categories based on gene characteristics. The company needs an ML algorithm to document how the inner mechanism of the model affects the output. Which ML algorithm meets these requirements?

A company has built an image classification model to predict plant diseases from photos of plant leaves. The company wants to evaluate how many images the model classified correctly. Which evaluation metric should the company use to measure the model’s performance?

A company is using a pre-trained large language model (LLM) to build a chatbot for product recommendations. The company needs the LLM outputs to be short and written in a specific language. Which solution will align the LLM response quality with the company’s expectations?

options.B: Choose an LLM of a different size.

question: A company uses Amazon SageMaker for its ML pipeline in a production environment. The company has large input data sizes up to 1 GB and processing times up to 1 hour. The company needs near real-time latency. Which SageMaker inference option meets these requirements?

A company is using domain-specific models. The company wants to avoid creating new models from the beginning. The company instead wants to adapt pre-trained models to create models for new, related tasks. Which ML strategy meets these requirements?

A company is building a solution to generate images for protective eyewear. The solution must have high accuracy and must minimize the risk of incorrect annotations. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Human-in-the-loop validation by using Amazon SageMaker Ground Truth Plus
options.B: Data augmentation by using an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base
options.C: Image recognition by using Amazon Rekognition
options.D: Data summarization by using Amazon QuickSight Q

question: A company wants to create a chatbot by using a foundation model (FM) on Amazon Bedrock. The FM needs to access encrypted data that is stored in an Amazon S3 bucket. The data is encrypted with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3). The FM encounters a failure when attempting to access the S3 bucket data. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Ensure that the role that Amazon Bedrock assumes has permission to decrypt data with the correct encryption key.
options.B: Set the access permissions for the S3 buckets to allow public access to enable access over the internet.
options.C: Use prompt engineering techniques to tell the model to look for information in Amazon S3.
options.D: Ensure that the S3 data does not contain sensitive information.

question: A company wants to use language models to create an application for inference on edge devices. The inference must have the lowest latency possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Deploy optimized small language models (SLMs) on edge devices.
options.B: Deploy optimized large language models (LLMs) on edge devices.
options.C: Incorporate a centralized small language model (SLM) API for asynchronous communication with edge devices.
options.D: Incorporate a centralized large language model (LLM) API for asynchronous communication with edge devices.

question: A company wants to build an ML model by using Amazon SageMaker. The company needs to share and manage variables for model development across multiple teams. Which SageMaker feature meets these requirements?

A company wants to use generative AI to increase developer productivity and software development. The company wants to use Amazon Q Developer. What can Amazon Q Developer do to help the company meet these requirements?

options.A: Create software snippets, reference tracking, and open source license tracking.
options.B: Run an application without provisioning or managing servers.
options.C: Enable voice commands for coding and providing natural language search.
options.D: Convert audio files to text documents by using ML models.

question: A financial institution is using Amazon Bedrock to develop an AI application. The application is hosted in a VPC. To meet regulatory compliance standards, the VPC is not allowed access to any internet traffic. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?
A company wants to develop an educational game where users answer probability questions. Which solution meets these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

options.A: Use supervised learning to create a regression model that will predict probability.
options.B: Use reinforcement learning to train a model to return the probability.
options.C: Use code that will calculate probability by using simple rules and computations.
options.D: Use unsupervised learning to create a model that will estimate probability density.

question: Which metric measures the runtime efficiency of operating AI models?

A company is building a contact center application and wants to gain insights from customer conversations. The company wants to analyze and extract key information from the audio of the customer calls. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Build a conversational chatbot by using Amazon Lex.
options.B: Transcribe call recordings by using Amazon Transcribe.
options.C: Extract information from call recordings by using Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor.
options.D: Create classification labels by using Amazon Comprehend.

question: A company has petabytes of unlabeled customer data to use for an advertisement campaign. The company wants to classify its customers into tiers to advertise and promote the company’s products. Which methodology should the company use to meet these requirements?

An AI practitioner wants to use a foundation model (FM) to design a search application. The search application must handle queries that have text and images. Which type of FM should the AI practitioner use?

A company uses a foundation model (FM) from Amazon Bedrock for an AI search tool. The company wants to fine-tune the model to be more accurate by using the company’s data. Which strategy will successfully fine-tune the model?

options.A: Provide labeled data with the prompt field and the completion field.
options.B: Prepare the training dataset in CSV format inside a text file.
options.C: Purchase Provisioned Throughput for Amazon Bedrock.
options.D: Train the model on journals and textbooks.

question: A company wants to use AI to protect its application from threats. The AI solution needs to check if an IP address is from a suspicious source. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.B: Create a named entity recognition system.

question: Which feature of Amazon OpenSearch Service gives companies the ability to build vector database applications?

options.A: Integration with Amazon S3 for object storage
options.B: Support for geospatial indexing and queries
options.C: Scalable index management and nearest neighbor search capability
options.D: Ability to perform real-time analysis on streaming data

question: Which option is a use case for generative AI models?

options.A: Improving network security by using intrusion detection systems
options.B: Creating photorealistic images from text descriptions for digital marketing
options.C: Enhancing database performance by using optimized indexing
options.D: Analyzing financial data to forecast stock market trends

question: A company wants to build a generative AI application by using Amazon Bedrock and needs to choose a foundation model (FM). The company wants to know how much information can fit into one prompt. Which consideration will inform the company’s decision?

A company wants to make a chatbot to help customers. The chatbot will help solve technical problems without human intervention. The company chose a foundation model (FM) for the chatbot. The chatbot needs to produce responses that adhere to company tone. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Set a low limit on the number of tokens the FM can produce.
options.B: Use batch inferencing to process detailed responses.
options.C: Experiment and refine the prompt until the FM produces the desired responses.
options.D: Define a higher number for the temperature parameter.

question: A company wants to use a large language model (LLM) on Amazon Bedrock for sentiment analysis. The company wants to classify the sentiment of text passages as positive or negative. Which prompt engineering strategy meets these requirements?

options.A: Provide examples of text passages with corresponding positive or negative labels in the prompt followed by the new text passage to be classified.
options.B: Provide a detailed explanation of sentiment analysis and how LLMs work in the prompt.
options.C: Provide the new text passage to be classified without any additional context or examples.
options.D: Provide the new text passage with examples of unrelated tasks.

question: A security company is using Amazon Bedrock to run foundation models (FMs). The company wants to ensure that only authorized users invoke the models. The company needs to identify unauthorized access attempts to set IAM policies and roles. Which AWS service should the company use?

A company has developed an ML model for image classification. The company wants to deploy the model so a web application can use it without managing infrastructure. Which solution meets these requirements?
An AI company evaluates compliance reports from independent software vendors and wants email notifications when reports become available. Which AWS service should be used?
A company wants to use a large language model (LLM) to develop a conversational agent and prevent prompt injection attacks. Which action will reduce the risk?

options.A: Create a prompt template that teaches the LLM to detect attack patterns.
options.C: Avoid using LLMs not listed in SageMaker.
options.D: Decrease the number of input tokens.

question: A company is using the Generative AI Security Scoping Matrix to assess security responsibilities. Which scope gives the MOST ownership of security responsibilities?

options.A: Using a third-party application with generative AI
options.B: Building an app using a third-party FM
options.D: Building and training a model from scratch

question: An AI practitioner has a database of animal photos. The AI practitioner wants to automatically identify and categorize the animals in the photos without manual human effort. Which strategy meets these requirements?

A company wants to create an application by using Amazon Bedrock. The company has a limited budget and prefers flexibility without long-term commitment. Which Amazon Bedrock pricing model meets these requirements?
Which AWS service or feature can help an AI development team quickly deploy and consume a foundation model (FM) within the team’s VPC?
How can companies use large language models (LLMs) securely on Amazon Bedrock?

options.A: Design clear prompts and configure IAM roles using least privilege
options.B: Enable AWS Audit Manager for model evaluation
options.D: Use CloudWatch Logs to make models explainable

question: A company has terabytes of data and wants an AI app that generates SQL queries from natural language input. Employees have minimal technical knowledge. Which solution meets these requirements?
A company built a deep learning model for object detection and deployed it to production. When the model analyzes a new image to identify objects, which AI process occurs?
An AI practitioner is building an image generation model but discovers biased training data causing biased outputs. Which technique will solve the problem?
A company is using the Amazon Titan model with Amazon Bedrock and needs to supplement it with private company data. Which solution meets this requirement?

options.C: Create an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base

options.A: Add one PDF to prompt context

An airline company wants to build a conversational AI assistant to answer customer questions about flight schedules, booking, and payments. The company wants to use large language models (LLMs) and a knowledge base to create a text-based chatbot interface. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

options.A: Train models on Amazon SageMaker Autopilot.
options.B: Develop a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) agent by using Amazon Bedrock.
options.C: Create a Python application by using Amazon Q Developer.
options.D: Fine-tune models on Amazon SageMaker Jumpstart.

question: What is tokenization used for in natural language processing (NLP)?

options.C: To break text into smaller units for processing

question: Which option is a characteristic of transformer-based language models?

options.A: Transformer-based language models use convolutional layers to apply filters across an input to capture local patterns through filtered views.
options.B: Transformer-based language models can process only text data.
options.C: Transformer-based language models use self-attention mechanisms to capture contextual relationships.
options.D: Transformer-based language models process data sequences one element at a time in cyclic iterations.

question: A financial company is using AI systems to obtain customer credit scores as part of the loan application process. The company wants to expand to a new market in a different geographic area. The company must ensure that it can operate in that geographic area. Which compliance laws should the company review?

options.B: Local payment card data protection laws

question: A company uses Amazon Bedrock for its generative AI application. The company wants to use Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to detect and filter harmful user inputs and model-generated outputs. Which content categories can the guardrails filter?
Which scenario describes a potential risk and limitation of prompt engineering in the context of a generative AI model?

options.A: Prompt engineering does not ensure that the model always produces consistent and deterministic outputs, eliminating the need for validation.
options.B: Prompt engineering could expose the model to vulnerabilities such as prompt injection attacks.
options.C: Properly designed prompts reduce but do not eliminate the risk of data poisoning or model hijacking.
options.D: Prompt engineering does not ensure that the model will consistently generate highly reliable outputs when working with real-world data.

question: A publishing company built a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) based solution to give its users the ability to interact with published content. New content is published daily. The company wants to provide a near real-time experience to users. Which steps in the RAG pipeline should the company implement by using offline batch processing to meet these requirements?

options.B: Generation of embeddings for user queries

question: Which technique breaks a complex task into smaller subtasks that are sent sequentially to a large language model (LLM)?
An AI practitioner needs to improve the accuracy of a natural language generation model. The model uses rapidly changing inventory data. Which technique will improve the model’s accuracy?

A company wants to collaborate with several research institutes to develop an AI model. The company needs standardized documentation of model version tracking and a record of model development. Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Track the model changes by using Git.
options.B: Track the model changes by using Amazon Fraud Detector.
options.C: Track the model changes by using Amazon SageMaker Model Cards.
options.D: Track the model changes by using Amazon Comprehend.

question: A company that uses multiple ML models wants to identify changes in original model quality so that the company can resolve any issues.Which AWS service or feature meets these requirements?
What is the purpose of chunking in Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)?

options.A: To avoid database storage limitations for large text documents by storing parts or chunks of the text
options.B: To improve eﬀiciency by avoiding the need to convert large text into vector embeddings
options.C: To improve the contextual relevancy of results retrieved from the vector index
options.D: To decrease the cost of storage by storing parts or chunks of the text

question: A company is developing an editorial assistant application that uses generative AI. During the pilot phase, usage is low and application performance is not a concern. The company cannot predict application usage after the application is fully deployed and wants to minimize application costs.Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.B: Use Amazon Bedrock with Provisioned Throughput.
options.C: Use Amazon Bedrock with On-Demand Throughput.

question: A company deployed a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) application on Amazon Bedrock that gathers financial news to distribute in daily newsletters. Users have recently reported politically influenced ideas in the newsletters.Which Amazon Bedrock guardrail can identify and filter this content?

A financial company is developing a fraud detection system that flags potential fraud cases in credit card transactions. Employees will evaluate the flagged fraud cases. The company wants to minimize the amount of time the employees spend reviewing flagged fraud cases that are not actually fraudulent.Which evaluation metric meets these requirements?
A company designed an AI-powered agent to answer customer inquiries based on product manuals.Which strategy can improve customer confidence levels in the AI-powered agent’s responses?

options.A: Writing the confidence level in the response
options.B: Including referenced product manual links in the response
options.C: Designing an agent avatar that looks like a computer
options.D: Training the agent to respond in the company’s language style

question: A hospital developed an AI system to provide personalized treatment recommendations for patients. The AI system must provide the rationale behind the recommendations and make the insights accessible to doctors and patients.Which human-centered design principle does this scenario present?
Which statement presents an advantage of using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) for natural language processing (NLP) tasks?

options.A: RAG can use external knowledge sources to generate more accurate and informative responses.
options.B: RAG is designed to improve the speed of language model training.
options.C: RAG is primarily used for speech recognition tasks.
options.D: RAG is a technique for data augmentation in computer vision tasks.

question: A company has created a custom model by fine-tuning an existing large language model (LLM) from Amazon Bedrock. The company wants to deploy the model to production and use the model to handle a steady rate of requests each minute.Which solution meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Deploy the model by using an Amazon EC2 compute optimized instance.
options.B: Use the model with on-demand throughput on Amazon Bedrock.
options.C: Store the model in Amazon S3 and host the model by using AWS Lambda.
options.D: Purchase Provisioned Throughput for the model on Amazon Bedrock.

question: Which technique involves training AI models on labeled datasets to adapt the models to specific industry terminology and requirements?

A company is creating an agent for its application by using Amazon Bedrock Agents. The agent is performing well, but the company wants to improve the agent’s accuracy by providing some specific examples.Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Modify the advanced prompts for the agent to include the examples.
options.B: Create a guardrail for the agent that includes the examples.
options.C: Use Amazon SageMaker Ground Truth to label the examples.
options.D: Run a script in AWS Lambda that adds the examples to the training dataset.

question: Which option is a benefit of using infrastructure as code (IaC) in machine learning operations (MLOps)?

options.A: IaC eliminates the need for hyperparameter tuning.
options.B: IaC always provisions powerful compute instances, contributing to the training of more accurate models.
options.C: IaC streamlines the deployment of scalable and consistent ML workloads in cloud environments.
options.D: IaC minimizes overall expenses by deploying only low-cost instances.

question: A company wants to fine-tune a foundation model (FM) to answer questions for a specific domain. The company wants to use instruction-based fine-tuning.How should the company prepare the training data?

options.A: Gather company internal documents and industry-specific materials. Merge the documents and materials into a single file.
options.B: Collect external company reviews from various online sources. Manually label each review as either positive or negative.
options.C: Create pairs of questions and answers that specifically address topics related to the company’s industry domain.
options.D: Create few-shot prompts to instruct the model to answer only domain knowledge.

question: Which ML technique ensures data compliance and privacy when training AI models on AWS?

The company wants to scale this logic across markets and product lines.Which advantage do generative AI models offer for this scenario?

options.C: Less sensitivity to changes in inputs

question: A financial company wants to flag all credit card activity as possibly fraudulent or non-fraudulent based on transaction data.Which type of ML model meets these requirements?
A hospital wants to use a generative AI solution with speech-to-text functionality to help improve employee skills in dictating clinical notes.Which AWS service meets these requirements?
Which type of AI model makes numeric predictions?

options.A: Splitting text into manageable pieces of data
options.B: Grouping a set of characters to be treated as a single unit
options.C: Providing the ability to mathematically compare texts
options.D: Providing the count of every word in the input

question: A company wants to fine-tune a foundation model (FM) by using AWS services. The company needs to ensure that its data stays private, safe, and secure in the source AWS Region where the data is stored.Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Host the model on premises by using AWS Outposts.
options.C: Use AWS PrivateLink and a VPC.
options.D: Host the Amazon Bedrock API on premises.

question: A financial company uses AWS to host its generative AI models. The company must generate reports to show adherence to international regulations for handling sensitive customer data.Which AWS service meets these requirements?

A medical company wants to modernize its onsite information processing application. The company wants to use generative AI to respond to medical questions from patients.Which AWS service should the company use to ensure responsible AI for the application?
Which metric is used to evaluate the performance of foundation models (FMs) for text summarization tasks?
What is the benefit of fine-tuning a foundation model (FM)?

options.A: Fine-tuning reduces the FM’s size and complexity and enables slower inference.
options.B: Fine-tuning uses specific training data to retrain the FM from scratch to adapt to a specific use case.
options.C: Fine-tuning keeps the FM’s knowledge up to date by pre-training the FM on more recent data.

question: A company wants to improve its chatbot’s responses to match the company’s desired tone. The company has 100 examples of high-quality conversations between customer service agents and customers. options.A: Give users the ability to interact based on user preferences.
options.B: Block interactions related to predefined topics.
options.C: Restrict user conversations to predefined topics.
options.D: Provide a variety of responses to select from for user engagement.

question: A company has developed a generative AI model for customer segmentation. The model has been deployed in the company’s production environment for a long time. A company has signed up for Amazon Bedrock access to build applications. The company wants to restrict employee access to specific models available on Amazon Bedrock.Which solution meets these requirements?

options.B: Use AWS Security Token Service (AWS STS) to generate temporary credentials for model use.
options.C: Use AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) service roles to restrict model subscription.
options.D: Use Amazon Inspector to monitor model access.

question: Which ML technique uses training data that is labeled with the correct output values?
Which large language model (LLM) parameter controls the number of possible next words or tokens considered at each step of the text generation process?

The company needs to convert the data into a vector representation before storing the data in a database.Which type of foundation model (FM) meets these requirements?

A company wants to use a large language model (LLM) to generate product descriptions. The company wants to give the model example descriptions that follow a format.Which prompt engineering technique will generate descriptions that match the format?

A bank is fine-tuning a large language model (LLM) on Amazon Bedrock to assist customers with questions about their loans. The bank wants to ensure that the model does not reveal any private customer data.Which solution meets these requirements?

options.B: Remove personally identifiable information (PII) from the customer data before fine-tuning the LLM.
options.C: Increase the Top-K parameter of the LLM.
options.D: Store customer data in Amazon S3. Encrypt the data before fine-tuning the LLM.

question: A grocery store wants to create a chatbot to help customers find products in the store. The chatbot must check the inventory in real time and provide the product location in the store.Which prompt engineering technique should the store use to build the chatbot?
A company uses a third-party model on Amazon Bedrock to analyze confidential documents. The company is concerned about data privacy.Which statement describes how Amazon Bedrock protects data privacy?

options.A: User inputs and model outputs are anonymized and shared with third-party model providers.
options.B: User inputs and model outputs are not shared with any third-party model providers.
options.C: User inputs are kept confidential, but model outputs are shared with third-party model providers.
options.D: User inputs and model outputs are redacted before the inputs and outputs are shared with third-party model providers.

question: An animation company wants to provide subtitles for its content.Which AWS service meets this requirement?

An ecommerce company wants to group customers based on their purchase history and preferences to personalize the user experience of the company’s application.Which ML technique should the company use?
A company wants to control employee access to publicly available foundation models (FMs).Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Analyze cost and usage reports in AWS Cost Explorer.
options.B: Download AWS security and compliance documents from AWS Artifact.
options.C: Configure Amazon SageMaker JumpStart to restrict discoverable FMs.
options.D: Build a hybrid search solution by using Amazon OpenSearch Service.

question: A company has set up a translation tool to help its customer service team handle issues from customers around the world. The company wants to evaluate the performance of the translation tool. The company sets up a parallel data process that compares the responses from the tool to responses from actual humans. Both sets of responses are generated on the same set of documents.Which strategy should the company use to evaluate the translation tool?

options.A: Use the Bilingual Evaluation Understudy (BLEU) score to estimate the absolute translation quality of the two methods.
options.B: Use the Bilingual Evaluation Understudy (BLEU) score to estimate the relative translation quality of the two methods.
options.C: Use the BERTScore to estimate the absolute translation quality of the two methods.
options.D: Use the BERTScore to estimate the relative translation quality of the two methods.

question: An AI practitioner wants to generate more diverse and more creative outputs from a large language model (LLM).How should the AI practitioner adjust the inference parameter?

A company has developed custom computer vision models. The company needs a user-friendly interface for data labeling to minimize model mistakes on new real-world data.Which AWS service, feature, or tool meets these requirements?

A company is integrating AI into its employee recruitment and hiring solution. The company wants to mitigate bias risks and ensure responsible AI practices while prioritizing equitable hiring decisions.Which core dimensions of responsible AI should the company consider? (Choose two.)

A financial company has deployed an ML model to predict customer churn. The model has been running in production for 1 week. The company wants to evaluate how accurately the model predicts churn compared to actual customer behavior.Which metric meets these requirements?

options.B: Choose a different FM on Amazon Bedrock.
options.D: Deploy a custom model on Amazon Bedrock.

question: A food service company wants to collect a dataset to predict customer food preferences. The company wants to ensure that the food preferences of all demographics are included in the data.Which dataset characteristic does this scenario present?

A company wants to create a chatbot that answers questions about human resources policies. The company is using a large language model (LLM) and has a large digital documentation base.Which technique should the company use to optimize the generated responses?

The company wants the chatbot to speak in the target audience’s language style by using creative spelling and shortened words.Which metric will assess the LLM’s performance?

A customer service team is developing an application to analyze customer feedback and automatically classify the feedback into different categories. The categories include product quality, customer service, and delivery experience.Which A1 concept does this scenario present?

A financial services company must ensure that its generative AI-powered chatbot provides factual responses for regulatory compliance.Which solution prevents the underlying foundation model (FM) from hallucinating?

options.A: Use AWS Config to query compliance metadata by using natural language.
options.B: Configure Amazon Bedrock Guardrails to evaluate user inputs and model responses.
options.C: Use Amazon Fraud Detector to detect potentially fraudulent online activities.
options.D: Use AWS Audit Manager to prepare IT audit and compliance reports.

question: A company has created multiple ML models. The company needs a solution for storing, managing, and versioning the models.Which AWS service or feature meets these requirements?
An AI practitioner is building an ML model. The AI practitioner wants to provide model transparency and explainability to stakeholders.Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.D: Provide a secure model inference endpoint.

question: A company is developing an ML application. The application must automatically group similar customers and products based on their characteristics. Which ML strategy should the company use to meet these requirements?
A news agency publishes articles in English. The agency wants to make articles available in other languages.Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Add Amazon Transcribe to the company’s website.
options.B: Use the Amazon Translate real-time translation feature.
options.C: Add Amazon Personalize to the company’s website.
options.D: Use the Amazon Textract real-time document processing feature.

question: A bank is building a chatbot to answer customer questions about opening a bank account. The chatbot will use public bank documents to generate responses. The company will use Amazon Bedrock and prompt engineering to improve the chatbot’s responses.Which prompt engineering technique meets these requirements?

A documentary filmmaker wants to reach more viewers. The filmmaker wants to automatically add subtitles and voice-overs in multiple languages to their films.Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Use Amazon Transcribe and Amazon Translate to generate subtitles in other languages.
options.B: Use Amazon Textract and Amazon Translate to generate subtitles in other languages.
options.C: Use Amazon Polly to generate voice-overs in other languages.
options.D: Use Amazon Translate to generate voice-overs in other languages.
options.E: Use Amazon Textract to generate voice-overs in other languages.

question: A company wants to create a chatbot to answer employee questions about company policies. Company policies are updated frequently. The chatbot must reflect the changes in near real time. The company wants to choose a large language model (LLM).Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Fine-tune an LLM on the company policy text by using Amazon SageMaker.
options.B: Select a foundation model (FM) from Amazon Bedrock to build an application.
options.C: Create a Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) workflow by using Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases.
options.D: Use Amazon Q Business to build a custom Q App.

question: A company is using supervised learning to train an AI model on a small labeled dataset that is specific to a target task.Which step of the foundation model (FM) lifecycle does this describe?

A company is introducing a new feature for its application. The feature will refine the style of output messages. The company will fine-tune a large language model (LLM) on Amazon Bedrock to implement the feature.Which type of data does the company need to meet these requirements?

options.C: Samples of pairs of input and output messages
options.D: Separate samples of input and output messages

question: A healthcare company is building an AI solution to predict patient readmission within 30 days of patient discharge. The company has trained a model on historical patient data including medical history, demographics, and treatment specifications, to provide readmission predictions in real time.Which task describes AI model inference in this scenario?

options.B: Use appropriate metrics and assess model performance.
options.C: Use data to identify patient patterns and correlations.
options.D: Use a trained model to predict patient readmission.

question: A financial company wants to build workflows for human review of ML predictions. The company wants to define confidence thresholds for its use case and adjust the thresholds over time.Which AWS service meets these requirements?

A company wants to build and deploy ML models on AWS without writing any code.Which AWS service or feature meets these requirements?

A design company is using a foundation model (FM) on Amazon Bedrock to generate images for various projects. The company wants to have control over how detailed or abstract each generated image appearsWhich model parameter should the company modify?

A financial company has offices in different countries worldwide. The company requires that all API calls between generative AI applications and foundation models (FM) must not travel across the public internet.Which AWS service should the company use?

The company must implement safeguards for the chatbot to filter harmful content from the input prompts and chatbot responses.Which AWS feature or resource meets these requirements?
A company wants to learn about generative AI applications in an experimental environment.Which solution will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?

options.A: Diverse conversations that use relevant terminology
options.B: Time series data of general purpose historical sales

question: A financial company is developing a generative AI application for loan approval decisions. The company needs the application output to be responsible and fair.Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Review the training data to check for biases. Include data from all demographics in the training data.
options.B: Use a deep learning model with many hidden layers.
options.C: Keep the model’s decision-making process a secret to protect proprietary algorithms.
options.D: Continuously monitor the model’s performance on a static test dataset

question: An AI practitioner who has minimal ML knowledge wants to predict employee attrition without writing code.Which Amazon SageMaker feature meets this requirement?

options.B: Training on data privacy and encryption protocols
options.C: Training on bias awareness and responsible AI

question: A company has an ML model. The company wants to know how the model makes predictions.Which term refers to understanding model predictions?
A company wants to identify groups for its customers based on the customers’ demographics and buying patterns.Which algorithm should the company use to meet this requirement?
A company is working on a large language model (LLM) and noticed that the LLM’s outputs are not as diverse as expected.Which parameter should the company adjust?

A company is using an Amazon Nova Canvas model to generate images. The model generates images successfully.The company needs to prevent the model from including specific items in the generated images.Which solution will meet this requirement?

A company wants to label training datasets by using human feedback to fine-tune a foundation model (FM). The company does not want to develop labeling applications or manage a labeling workforce.Which AWS service or feature meets these requirements?

options.C: Re-train the model with fresh data.

question: A financial company uses a generative AI model to assign credit limits to new customers. The company wants to make the decision-making process of the model more transparent to its customers.Which solution meets these requirements?

options.A: Use a rule-based system instead of an ML model.
options.B: Apply explainable AI techniques to show customers which factors influenced the model’s decision.
options.C: Develop an interactive UI for customers and provide clear technical explanations about the system.
options.D: Increase the accuracy of the model to reduce the need for transparency.

question: A company deployed a model to production. After 4 months, the model inference quality degraded. The company wants to receive a notification if the model inference quality degrades. The company also wants to ensure that the problem does not happen again.Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Retrain the model. Monitor model drift by using Amazon SageMaker Clarify.
options.B: Retrain the model. Monitor model drift by using Amazon SageMaker Model Monitor.
options.C: Build a new model. Monitor model drift by using Amazon SageMaker Feature Store.
options.D: Build a new model. Monitor model drift by using Amazon SageMaker JumpStart.

question: Which option is an example of unsupervised learning?

options.A: A model that groups customers based on their purchase history
options.B: A model that classifies images as dogs or cats
options.C: A model that predicts a house’s price based on various features
options.D: A model that learns to play chess by using trial and error

question: A company is evaluating several large language models (LLMs) for a text summarization task. The company needs to select a metric to evaluate the quality of the summaries that the LLMs generate.Which metric will meet this requirement?

The research group wants to use a team of scientists to perform the output assessments.Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use automatic evaluation on Amazon Personalize.
options.B: Use content moderation on Amazon Rekognition.
options.C: Use model evaluation on Amazon Bedrock.

question: Sentiment analysis is a subset of which broader field of AI?

options.A: Use Amazon CloudFront to restrict access to the company’s private content.

options.C: Use AWS Lake Formation to manage centralized data governance and crossaccount data sharing.

question: A company receives a large amount of unstructured user feedback in text format. The company wants to analyze the sentiment of the user feedback. Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.B: Use a regression algorithm to classify the feedback based on predefined categories. Then, analyze user sentiment.
options.C: Use a recommendation engine algorithm to detect user sentiment.
options.D: Use a time series algorithm to predict user sentiment based on past feedback.

options.B: Training a model to recognize images of animals
options.C: Predicting the price of a house based on the house’s features
options.D: Generating human-like text based on a given prompt

question: An online learning company with large volumes of education materials wants to use enterprise search.Which AWS service meets these requirements?

options.B: Use the Amazon Nova Canvas model on Amazon Bedrock to generate intermediate images. Use video editing software to create videos.
options.C: Use the Amazon Nova Reel model on Amazon Bedrock to generate videos.

question: A company is using Amazon Bedrock for a generative AI solution. The solution must integrate a service with vector database storage and vector search capabilities.Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

options.A: The process of creating new AI algorithms

options.C: The process of combining multiple AI models into one model
options.D: The method of collecting training data for AI systems

options.B: Use Amazon Polly to create an audiobook based on story texts.
options.C: Use Amazon Rekognition to analyze image contents and detect text attributes.

question: A healthcare company wants to analyze patient data. The data was gathered over the previous year to detect patterns in disease outbreaks. A company has guidelines for data storage and deletion.Which data governance strategy does this describe?

options.A: Create a deep neural network by using the images as input.
options.B: Create an AWS Lambda function to perform the transformations.

question: An AI practitioner is writing software code. The AI practitioner wants to quickly develop a test case and create documentation for the code.Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST effort?

options.B: Develop an application to use foundation models (FMs).

options.D: Research and write test cases. Then, create test cases and add documentation.

question: A company is developing a generative AI application to automatically generate product descriptions for an ecommerce website. The product descriptions must consist of paragraphs of text that are consistent in style and tone. An AI practitioner has trained a model on a training dataset. The model performs well on the training data. However, the model does not perform well on evaluation data.What is the MOST likely cause of this issue?
A company wants to develop an interpretable ML model to assess the risk of loan applications.Which type of ML model or algorithm will meet these requirements?
A company stores customer personally identifiable information (PII) data. The company must store the PII data within the company’s AWS Region.Which aspect of governance does this describe?

options.A: Immediately start training a custom FM by using the company’s existing data.
options.B: Conduct stakeholder interviews to refine use cases and set measurable goals.
options.C: Implement a prebuilt AI assistant solution and measure its impact on customer satisfaction.
options.D: Analyze industry AI implementations and replicate the most successful features.

question: A healthcare company wants to create a model to improve disease diagnostics by analyzing patient voices. The company has recorded hundreds of patient voices for this project.The company is currently filtering voice recordings according to duration and language.Which phase of the ML lifecycle describes the current project phase?

A company is using Amazon Bedrock to build an AI assistant. The AI assistant helps customers find relevant products by making suggestions. However, the AI assistant’s responses are often generic and irrelevant. The company wants to use prompt engineering to improve the AI assistant’s responses.Which solution will meet these requirements?

options.A: Use few-shot prompting to add domain-specific context and explicit instructions.
options.B: Use chain-of-thought prompting with hidden reasoning steps to ignore explicit domain instructions.
options.C: Modify the AI assistant’s conversational style to use more formal language and include technical product specifications.
options.D: Use zero-shot prompting to augment retrieval from a product database.

question: A company runs a website for users to make travel reservations. The company wants an AI solution to help create consistent branding for hotels on the website.The AI solution needs to generate hotel descriptions for the website in a consistent writing style.Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

The LLM does not have information about several technical topics in the domain. The company has unlabeled data that the company can use to fine-tune the model.Which fine-tuning method will meet these requirements?
A company wants to use Amazon Q Business for its data. The company needs to ensure the security and privacy of the data.Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

options.A: Enable AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) keys for the Amazon Q Business Enterprise index.
options.B: Set up cross-account access to the Amazon Q index.
options.D: Allow public access to the Amazon Q index.
options.E: Configure AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) for authentication.

question: A company uses Amazon Comprehend to analyze customer feedback. A customer has several unique trained models. The company uses Comprehend to assign each model an endpoint. The company wants to automate a report on each endpoint that is not used for more than 15 days.Which service will meet these requirements?
